channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Rise of Marshmallow Furniture: Soft, Rounded Designs in Modern Interiors
item.description: After years of favouring minimalist designs with sharp lines and functional aesthetics, interior trends are shifting toward softer, more approachable furniture. Referred to as 'marshmallow furniture,'...

item.title: Your Guide to Cape Town and Johannesburg Events from 13-19 April 2026
item.description: From 13 to 19 April 2026, South Africans have a variety of events to enjoy across the country. In Cape Town, the legendary Richard O’Brien’s Rocky Horror Show will run at Theatre on the Bay from 14 Ap...

item.title: DSWD distributes cash assistance to over 477,000 tricycle drivers nationwide amid fuel price hikes
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) announced that more than 265,000 tricycle drivers in Metro Manila and over 212,000 tricycle drivers in major cities outside the National Capital...

item.title: Kim Jong-un Expresses Support for China’s Vision of a Multipolar Global Order in Diplomatic Talks
item.description: During a recent diplomatic meeting in Pyongyang, North Korean leader Kim Jong-un expressed his strong support for China’s call for a multipolar world order, indicating closer political coordination be...

item.title: Artemis II Astronauts Safely Return to Earth After Historic Lunar Mission
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission has marked a significant milestone in human space exploration, as the crew successfully returned to Earth after completing the first lunar mission in more than fifty years. T...

item.title: Knicks secure 13th straight win over Raptors with Brunson’s 29 points
item.description: The New York Knicks defeated the Toronto Raptors 112-95, marking their 13th consecutive victory over Toronto. Jalen Brunson led the way with 29 points, while Karl-Anthony Towns contributed 22 points a...

item.title: Physical Altercation Breaks Out Between PPP and Jamaat Members at Karachi City Council Meeting
item.description: On Friday, a serious altercation took place in the Karachi City Council when members of the ruling Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) and opposition Jamaat-i-Islami (JI) clashed during a session over seatin...

item.title: Nigeria poverty rate hits 63% in 2025 despite falling inflation – World Bank
item.description: The World Bank has reported that poverty in Nigeria has risen to 63 percent in 2025, affecting about 140 million Nigerians, even though inflation has been slowing down. The bank said that since Presid...

item.title: Michelle Hickmott Named Staffordshire Fire and Rescue Service Deputy Chief
item.description: Michelle Hickmott, a former England international footballer (Lioness), has been appointed as the new deputy chief fire officer for Staffordshire Fire and Rescue Service. Hickmott, who previously play...

item.title: Elliot Lake Mall Settlement: Families to Receive Compensation After Decade of Trauma
item.description: After more than a decade of legal proceedings, families of the two victims who perished in the Elliot Lake mall collapse will finally receive a settlement. The collapse, which occurred in 2014, was at...

item.title: Proposed Kingsville lab would study human decomposition to advance forensic science
item.description: A Windsor-based forensic scientist, Dr. Shari Forbes, is proposing the creation of an outdoor human decomposition research facility in Kingsville, Ontario. The planned site, to be called the Southwest...

item.title: Trump administration introduces automatic military draft registration amid ongoing conflicts
item.description: Critics have raised serious concerns over recent changes to the U.S. military draft registration process, implemented under President Donald Trump's administration. The legislation, signed in December...

item.title: ICE Arrests Three Men Near Rancho Cucamonga Courthouse, Sparking Advocacy Concerns
item.description: Federal immigration agents conducted a series of arrests outside a San Bernardino County Superior Court in Rancho Cucamonga, California, on Thursday, April 10, 2026. At least three men were detained, ...

item.title: South Africa Introduces Proposed Bill to Enhance Whistleblower Protection
item.description: The South African government has introduced the Protected Disclosures Bill, aimed at bolstering protection for whistleblowers who expose corruption. Minister of Justice and Constitutional Development,...

item.title: India-China relations and wider diplomatic challenges since Galwan clash
item.description: In this detailed interview, scholar Jabin Jacob discusses the state of India’s foreign relations, particularly with China, following the 2020 Galwan clash. He terms the current approach as a 'marking-...

item.title: Congress calls for unified national approach to West Asia conflict and criticises government foreign policy
item.description: The Congress party has urged the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP)-led central government to prioritise India’s national interest over electoral and ideological considerations in its foreign policy towards...

item.title: Jacobite steam train season delayed due to safety review of historic carriages
item.description: The Jacobite steam train, famous for its role as the Hogwarts Express in the Harry Potter films, is facing a delay to the start of its new season. Operated by West Coast Railways (WCR) on the West Hig...

item.title: KPC Logistics Manager Granted Anticipatory Bail Amid Fuel Investigation
item.description: Joel Mburu, a logistics manager at Kenya Pipeline Company (KPC), has been granted anticipatory bail of Sh5 million with an equal surety after moving to the High Court citing fears of arrest over the S...

item.title: Artemis II astronauts safely complete historic lunar test mission
item.description: The four astronauts of NASA’s Artemis II mission have successfully returned to Earth, marking the completion of the first crewed lunar test flight in more than fifty years. The team — Reid Wiseman, Ch...

item.title: Pakistan Facilitates Dialogue Between Iran and the United States
item.description: According to the PTI, Pakistan has stepped up and played a crucial role on the international scene by helping to arrange talks between Iran and the United States. These discussions aim to find a solut...
